title: My Updated EMA Settings! Impossible to Lose with THIS Strategy!

summary_bullets: The name of this setup is Double 8.

When you add this indicator, automatically four moving averages are added to the chart and now we need to change their settings.
So here we go to the settings of the Reben and first here for the moving average type, we set exponential moving average for them because as I said, we need four exponential moving averages.
So here we set EMA for them and then for the first EMA, we set the length at eight and for the second EMA, we also set the length at eight.
For the first EMA here for the source of calculation, we set it at high and for the second one, we set it based on low.
So here we have two EMAs with the same length of eight, but one of them is based on high and the other one is based on low.

extracted_rules: When you add this indicator, automatically four moving averages are added to the chart and now we need to change their settings.

If you remember these two white lines here are EMA with length of eight, one based on high and the other one based on low and they created a channel on the price chart, which we call it white channel.
From here, when this candle is closed, you can see that both of the white lines are above the green channel.
When we got this, we go back on the price action and we find the highest high and we mark this level.
If it is far from the green channel, it is not a good pullback and you shouldn't take any action.
Alright, so we already marked this high and we should wait and see if the price is able to close above this level or not because this high can act as a potential resistance level.

You can see that this candle is closed above the high so here the reversal of the price is confirmed and in practice, we could enter a long position at this point with the stop loss below the pullback and profit target at risk to reward ratio of two.

strategy_components.description: This green channel is gonna help us with trend changes and the white channel is gonna help us with momentum changes inside trends.
This is a reversal trading strategy and we're gonna find the points of the market that the trend is changing and then we're gonna find an excellent opportunity to enter a trade.
This is an early signal that probably an uptrend is forming in the market.
